title: WatchParty
description: A modpack that allows you to watch anything in minecraft
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/739b7a92bb0ded918d1550ec85ad0cdddb807a88.png)
## SHOWCASE
<iframe width="280" height="157" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/JSYxrPMXipI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## FEATURES
- Access DISNEY PLUS, PRIME VIDEO, HBO, YOUTUBE, AND MORE! (WEBDISPLAYS)
- USE EMOTES (EMOTECRAFT)
- EZ WORLD HOSTING (e4mc & ESSENTIAL)


(Netflix not supported due to mod issues)
